must_detect.matched_text: Lautan Cerah Holdings Berhad Privacy Notice and DSAR/Retention Workflow (Malaysia PDPA; Capital Markets and Services Act) for employment, financing, and issuer disclosure contexts.

Purposes include HR administration, negotiating financing, M&A evaluations, and compliance with the Listing Requirements of the Malaysian exchange, including preparation of immediate announcements for material information relating to our securities.

Retention: HR files 7 years post-termination; financing and security documents 7 years after maturity; investor relations correspondence 3 years; MNPI working papers kept until 2 years after the relevant public release on the Exchange plus completion of audit or review.
